wine_hotels.name: Weinromantikhotel Richtershof
wine_hotels.address: Hauptstrasse 81-83, 54486 Muelheim an der Mosel, Germany
wine_hotels.category: 4-star Superior hotel in a former winery
wine_hotels.description: Romantic hotel set in a 17th-century former winery and its grounds near the Moselle at Muelheim. Wine-themed rooms, a spa and a restaurant make it a flagship Middle Mosel estate-style stay.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Mosel wine list and tastings; wine-themed rooms and packages

wine_hotels.name: DEINHARD's Hotel
wine_hotels.description: Modern boutique hotel on the Bernkastel promenade with a rooftop wine lounge over the vineyards, a historic cellar and the wineBANK members' club.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Rooftop wine bar, cellar tastings at DEINHARD's Markthaus and the wineBANK Mosel members' club

wine_hotels.name: Hotel zur Post
wine_hotels.description: Long-running family hotel on the Bernkastel promenade by the Moselle, a short walk from the medieval Marktplatz. A classic base for Middle Mosel wine touring with regional dining and Mosel wines.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Regional Mosel wine list in the hotel restaurant; close to the town's vinotheks

wine_hotels.name: Hotel-Restaurant Doctor-Weinstube
wine_hotels.description: Hotel and wine tavern in a 1668 former tithe house at the foot of the famous Bernkasteler Doctor vineyard, surrounded by vines. Mosel Rieslings and regional cooking in a centuries-old setting.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Doctor and Doctorberg Rieslings on the Weinstube list; tasting menus

wine_hotels.name: Moselhotel Sonnenuhr
wine_hotels.category: Bed and breakfast on the Mosel
wine_hotels.description: Riverside B&B in Wehlen looking across to the Wehlener Sonnenuhr vineyard, directly on the Mosel cycle path. Bike and e-bike hire make it a practical base for slate-slope wine touring.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Local Wehlen and Zeltingen Rieslings; bike and e-bike hire for vineyard touring

wine_hotels.name: Weingut und Gaestehaus Schmitz-Bergweiler
wine_hotels.description: Family wine estate and guesthouse on a private vineyard in the centre of Bernkastel-Kues, five generations into Mosel winemaking. Rooms and apartments with a terrace wine bar pouring the house wines.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Estate Mosel wines served at the terrace wine bar; cellar visits and tastings

wine_hotels.name: Gast- und Weinhaus Burkard
wine_hotels.description: Family-run guesthouse in the heart of medieval Bernkastel, 200 metres from the Moselle off the Gestade promenade. A homely wine-house base steps from the Marktplatz and the town's vinotheks.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Regional Mosel wines in the wine house; walking distance to vinotheks

wine_hotels.name: schanz. hotel.
wine_hotels.description: Boutique rooms attached to Thomas Schanz's Michelin-starred restaurant in Piesport, home of the Goldtroepfchen vineyard. A stay built around the kitchen and a cellar deep in aged Mosel Riesling.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Access to the restaurant's aged Mosel Riesling cellar and the family estate wines
